tax_note: Simples Nacional for small businesses (up to R$4.8M); MEI tax ~R$67/month for income up to R$81K/year

vat_gst.name: Multiple taxes (ICMS, ISS, PIS, COFINS — being unified into IBS/CBS under 2023 reform)
vat_gst.rate_percent: Varies: ISS 2-5% on services; ICMS 7-18% on goods; PIS/COFINS 3.65-9.25%. Simples Nacional consolidates into one simplified rate.
vat_gst.registration_threshold: R$81,000/year for MEI; R$4.8M/year for Simples Nacional
vat_gst.registration_threshold_note: MEI is the simplest regime with a fixed monthly tax of ~R$67-72. Above R$81K, transition to Microempresa under Simples Nacional. Simples Nacional consolidates federal, state, and municipal taxes into one payment with progressive rates.
vat_gst.digital_products: Digital services are subject to ISS (municipal service tax, 2-5%) in the municipality where the provider is established. For international sales, services exported are generally ISS-exempt if payment is received in foreign currency. The 2023 tax reform (IBS/CBS) will simplify this when fully implemented (expected 2026-2033 transition).

digital_product_tax: Software licensing and SaaS are classified as services (ISS). Digital product sales may also trigger ICMS in some states (ongoing legal debate). Under MEI or Simples Nacional, all taxes are consolidated into a single simplified payment. Export of services is generally tax-exempt. The tax reform transition will clarify digital product treatment over the next several years.

entity_comparison.liability: Unlimited personal liability (though separation of assets is possible)
entity_comparison.tax_treatment: Fixed monthly tax (~R$67-72) covers INSS + ISS or ICMS. Revenue cap R$81K/year. Cannot have partners or more than 1 employee.
entity_comparison.best_for: Starting out; solo freelancers; revenue under R$81K/year; extremely simple

entity_comparison.type: ME/EPP (Microempresa / Empresa de Pequeno Porte) under Simples Nacional
entity_comparison.liability: Limited (if structured as Ltda or SLU)
entity_comparison.tax_treatment: Simples Nacional: consolidated tax starting at 6% for services (Anexo III) or 15.5% (Anexo V), progressive based on revenue. Up to R$4.8M/year.
entity_comparison.best_for: Revenue R$81K-4.8M; need employees or partners; still relatively simple compliance

entity_comparison.liability: Limited to company assets (no minimum capital requirement)
entity_comparison.tax_treatment: Can use Simples Nacional (if eligible) or Lucro Presumido (presumed profit method — effective rate ~13-16% for services).
entity_comparison.best_for: Solo founders wanting limited liability; revenue above R$81K; more professional than MEI

isp_note: Fiber expanding rapidly; Vivo/Claro/TIM in most urban centers
